final_text:
{
  "deployment_strategy": "Blue-Green Deployment",
  "infrastructure_components": [
    "Docker containers",
    "CI/CD pipeline",
    "Load balancer",
    "Monitoring and logging tools"
  ],
  "environment_requirements": [
    "Kubernetes cluster",
    "PostgreSQL database",
    "OAuth2 authentication server",
    "Payment gateway integration",
    "Email service integration"
  ],
  "ci_cd_requirements": [
    "Automated build and deployment",
    "Continuous integration with unit and integration tests",
    "Continuous delivery with staging and production environments"
  ],
  "release_steps": [
    "Build Docker images for each microservice",
    "Push images to Docker registry",
    "Deploy new images to the green environment",
    "Run automated tests in the green environment",
    "Switch traffic from blue to green environment",
    "Monitor new release for issues"
  ],
  "rollback_steps": [
    "Switch traffic back to the blue environment",
    "Remove new Docker images from the green environment",
    "Notify stakeholders of the rollback"
  ],
  "monitoring_requirements": [
    "Real-time monitoring of microservices",
    "Logging for troubleshooting",
    "Alerts for critical issues",
    "Performance metrics tracking"
  ],
  "deployment_notes": [
    "Ensure all microservices are healthy before switching traffic.",
    "Keep both blue and green environments running during the switch.",
    "Monitor the new release closely for any issues."
  ]
}
